results.evidence: AI generation history tracked via writeHistoryEntry() in skill-create-routes.ts:537-547 (save-draft) with type ai-generate, stores prompt/model/provider/reasoning. aiMetaRef captures metadata in CreateSkillInline.tsx:99 and CreateSkillPage.tsx:104.

Plugin recommendation card implemented in CreateSkillInline.tsx:554-596 and CreateSkillPage.tsx:689-730. pluginLayoutInfo computed value detects layouts with plugins. Shown only when selectedLayout===3 and plugins exist. Use plugin button switches layout.
AI Generated banner (aiReasoning/reasoningExpanded state + JSX) removed from both CreateSkillInline.tsx and CreateSkillPage.tsx. No trace of reasoning display code remains.
Test cases section (Generated Test Cases card) removed from both components. pendingEvals state retained for data passing to backend but not displayed in UI.

Auto-save draft implemented: SSE done handler calls api.saveDraft() in CreateSkillInline.tsx:270-275 and CreateSkillPage.tsx:298-303. Backend POST /api/skills/save-draft at skill-create-routes.ts:477-560 creates SKILL.md, evals.json, draft.json. Create endpoint now allows overwriting drafts (isDraftFinalize check).

SkillFileTree component at src/eval-ui/src/components/SkillFileTree.tsx renders folder structure. Imported and placed in CreateSkillInline.tsx:728-732 and CreateSkillPage.tsx:897-901. Shows SKILL.md, evals/, evals/history/, conditionally evals.json and draft.json.
Button label changes: CreateSkillInline.tsx:752 and CreateSkillPage.tsx:923 both use {creating ? 'Saving...' : aiGenerated ? 'Save' : 'Create Skill'}. aiGenerated state set to true on SSE done event.
renderMarkdown.ts: entire function body wrapped in try-catch (lines 11-79). YAML frontmatter stripped (line 13). Fallback renders as <pre> with HTML entity escaping on any error (lines 76-78).

findings.title: Create endpoint 409 conflict with draft auto-save — FIXED
findings.issue: POST /api/skills/create returned 409 'Skill already exists' after draft auto-save created SKILL.md, making the Save button always fail after AI generation.
findings.suggestion: Fixed: added isDraftFinalize check — create endpoint now allows overwriting when draft.json exists.
findings.impact: Without fix: Save button was broken for all AI-generated skills. Fix applied during grill.

findings.title: Duplicate history entries on create after draft save — FIXED
findings.issue: Both save-draft and create endpoints wrote ai-generate history entries, resulting in duplicate entries for a single generation event.
findings.suggestion: Fixed: create endpoint now skips writeHistoryEntry when isDraftFinalize is true.
findings.impact: Without fix: AI generation history would show duplicate entries. Fix applied during grill.
